product.name: Hubcaps Wheel Covers Replacement R15 Size Hub Caps Universal-Fit Steel Wheel ABS Rims Cover Tire Cap for Car Sedan SUV Truck Van -Set of 4 （15-inch，Black）
features: Steel Wheels Universal Fit - Design for 15" Steel(Non-alloy) Wheels only，NOT compatible with alloy rims，NOT for wheel hub center is raised above the rim level，NOT for damaged/deformed steel rims， NOT for Steel Rims with Long Lug Nuts​. Compatible with Toyota, Honda, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Mazda, Mitsubishi, Nissan, Subaru, Volkswagen, Dodge, etc.
All-Round Protect Your Wheels - These hubcaps fit for most factory steel wheels can shields steel rims from scratches, rust, and brake dust buildup to keep your vehicle looking sleek and new.

Easy to Install and Clean - Our whell cover hubcaps can be easily snap on your wheels without the need for special tools and quickly rinsed with water pipes ，making them a great choice for busy vehicle owners.If your factory steel wheels are damaged/ deformed，they need to be repaired before installing，clean up the steel rims，in case the hubcaps crack in installation

Durable ABS Construction​ - Built with high-impact ABS plastic for long-lasting performance, these hubcaps resist cracks, fading, and corrosion from road debris, weather, and UV exposure, keep your vehicle looking great for years.
Stylish Design - Upgrade your vehicle’s look with modern style glossy finish hub caps to match your car’s aesthetics，enhance the sleek appearance of your vehicle.
